workExperience.description: I design secure, self-service infrastructure that handles the complexity of global scale so engineers can focus on shipping code. By combining least-privilege IAM with dynamic secrets management, I've created environments that are both bulletproof and frictionless reducing security headaches and deployment delays.
highlights: Built self-service tools eliminating manual workflows – improved team efficiency by 30%.
Designed secure, automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.

workExperience.description: Architected and deployed robust, scalable cloud infrastructure using the Well-Architected Framework with a focus on security and high availability. Drove FinOps initiatives surfacing cost visibility to engineering teams.
highlights: Reduced monthly cloud spend by 30% through proactive resource optimization.
Implemented Infrastructure-as-Code with Terraform – achieved 1-day RTO in disaster recovery.

workExperience.description: Operated and maintained large-scale hybrid cloud platforms (3000+ servers) with 99% availability. Built observability standards and conducted root cause analysis for service outages.
highlights: Automated patching processes – achieved 90% success rate, reducing manual effort by 80%.
Managed large-scale EOL server migrations, reducing EOL footprint by 35%.

workExperience.description: Provided NOC support to MSPs in the US, UK, Australia, and Canada. Troubleshot server infrastructure issues, performed server migrations, and implemented monitoring best practices.
highlights: Managed Windows/VMware/Hyper-V/Azure environments for global clients.
Implemented proactive monitoring and alerting for critical infrastructure.

workExperience.description: Administered ISP core network infrastructure, configuring IP networking, routing protocols, high availability, VPNs, and firewalling to enforce network security.
highlights: Managed Cisco IOS XR, Juniper EX4550, and Palo Alto 5050 firewalls.
Configured VLANs, NAT, EBGP/IBGP, and system hardening (ACLs).

workExperience.description: Provided system support and maintenance for enterprise clients, troubleshooting hardware and software issues in mixed Windows/Linux environments.
highlights: Resolved critical system incidents, ensuring minimal downtime.
Assisted in server deployment and routine maintenance tasks.
